label: GCSEs in English and Maths
subtitle: Percentage of people achieving GCSEs in both subjects by age 19
description: This indicator shows GCSEs (and equivalent) in English and maths by age 19, in England, for academic years 2016/17 to 2024/25.
caveats:
All geography breakdowns are based on the school location of the young person at age 15 (year 11) and include only those educated in the state-funded sector.

Some of this data has been aggregated and may show differences to other published figures.
topic: Education and skills - Attainment and participation
